subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise beseemeth and befitteth the Beloved of all contingent beings, Who from the beginning of the sending forth of the Prophets and the chosen ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از بیان محبوب امکان را لایق و سزاست که از اول بعثت انبیا و اصفیا
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @love and unity, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures
